en: You know, dude, it is a little weird that you're talking to my doll.
I don't think I need a drag queen to define normal behavior.
But I will say this. The look... It's flawless.
ko: 하지만 이건 말할 수 있어, 모습이 완벽해.

en: Working the attitude. Okay, you're good.
I've had a lot of practice. Hey, hey, hey.
You're not that great, Mr. Sister.
All right? I do better Cher than you.
Actually, it's... You think so? Ho!
